embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

before.content:
@everyone

# 🌊 MAJOR STAFF UPDATE 🌊
We've completely overhauled how staffing works in Wave, a brand-new hub, Power roles, and a massive economy rebalance.

🔗 **It's all in one place:** https://wavedropmaps.github.io/wave-leaderboard/

**__🖥️ THE NEW WAVE STAFF HUB__**
One link for everything — live leaderboards, the economy, the shop, and a guide for every board:
📋 Staff Sheet · 🏆 Lifetime Activity · ⚔️ Weekly Activity · 💰 Economy 

----------------------------------------------------------
❓ Every board has a **`? GUIDE`** button (top-right) — tap it for the system with a visual explanation
- Example provided in images below!
----------------------------------------------------------

**__⚡ NEW: Power Tiers & Roles for the Lifetime Activity section __**
Every badge you earn — on **any** duty — builds your **Power Score**. Hit the thresholds for an exclusive **Discord role + a one-time WP bonus**:
🥉 Bronze 4pts → +20 · 🥈 Silver 8 → +50 · 🥇 Gold 16 → +100 · 🌟 Legend 32 → +300 · 👑 God 64 → +500 WP

**__💎 WAVE POINTS SHOP — 50% PRICE CUT__**
🌊 Pro Surge Route → **200 WP**
💰 Pro Loot Route → **400 WP**
🎯 Pro Drop Map → **700 WP**
⭐ Paid Priority → **400 WP**
🌊 Wave Contributor → **450 WP**
👑 VIP → **5,000 WP**

**__🗺️ LOOT ROUTE POINTS — 4× EARN RATES__**
⚡ Within 12h → **10 pts** (was 2.5)
⚡ Within 24h → **8 pts** (was 2)
🏃 Within 48h → **4 pts** (was 1)
🚶 Within 3 days → **2 pts** (was 0.5)
💀 Late penalty is now **descending** — -4 day 1, -3 day 2, -2 day 3, then -1/day
*(Loot route prizes have gone up as a result!)*

**__💱 CURRENCY EXCHANGE — REBALANCED__**
Loot Route Points are now stronger vs Wave Points — baseline raised to **1 LRP = 4 WP** (was 1.67).

**__🏆 ROLE GIVER WEEKLY — BIGGER PRIZES__**
🥇 1st → **700 VBucks** (was 500)
🥈 2nd → **400 VBucks** (was 300)
🥉 3rd → **200 VBucks** (unchanged)

🔗 **Check the full leaderboard & shop:** https://wavedropmaps.github.io/wave-leaderboard/?v=2


`Another major post coming in 24 hours.`

@everyone

# 🌊 MAJOR STAFF UPDATE 🌊
We've completely overhauled how staffing works in Wave, a brand-new hub, Power roles, and a massive economy rebalance.

🔗 **It's all in one place:** https://wavedropmaps.github.io/wave-leaderboard/?v=2


**__🖥️ THE NEW WAVE STAFF HUB__**
One link for everything — live leaderboards, the economy, the shop, and a guide for every board:
📋 Staff Sheet · 🏆 Lifetime Activity · ⚔️ Weekly Activity · 💰 Economy 

----------------------------------------------------------
❓ Every board has a **`? GUIDE`** button (top-right) — tap it for the system with a visual explanation
- Example provided in images below!
----------------------------------------------------------

**__⚡ NEW: Power Tiers & Roles for the Lifetime Activity section __**
Every badge you earn — on **any** duty — builds your **Power Score**. Hit the thresholds for an exclusive **Discord role + a one-time WP bonus**:
🥉 Bronze 4pts → +20 · 🥈 Silver 8 → +50 · 🥇 Gold 16 → +100 · 🌟 Legend 32 → +300 · 👑 God 64 → +500 WP

**__💎 WAVE POINTS SHOP — 50% PRICE CUT__**

💰 Pro Loot Route → **400 WP**
🎯 Pro Drop Map → **700 WP**

🌊 Wave Contributor → **450 WP**

**__🗺️ LOOT ROUTE POINTS — 4× EARN RATES__**
⚡ Within 12h → **10 pts** (was 2.5)
⚡ Within 24h → **8 pts** (was 2)
🏃 Within 48h → **4 pts** (was 1)
🚶 Within 3 days → **2 pts** (was 0.5)
💀 Late penalty is now **descending** — -4 day 1, -3 day 2, -2 day 3, then -1/day
*(Loot route prizes have gone up as a result!)*

**__💱 CURRENCY EXCHANGE — REBALANCED__**
Loot Route Points are now stronger vs Wave Points — baseline raised to **1 LRP = 4 WP** (was 1.67).
